  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing/kickers for anticipated pour pressure",
    "Formwork bracing does not meet engineered design or ACI 347 requirements",
    "Potential for catastrophic formwork failure during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all concrete placement and personnel access in the affected area immediately",
    "Barricade and secure the pour zone to prevent unauthorized entry",
    "Engage formwork designer/engineer to assess bracing adequacy and provide revised bracing plan",
    "Install additional bracing/kickers as per engineered design before resuming any pour",
    "Re-inspect formwork and bracing system prior to authorizing concrete placement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing for pour pressure presents an imminent risk of formwork blowout or collapse, which can result in multiple fatalities, serious injuries, and property damage. ACI 347 requires formwork to be designed, fabricated, erected, supported, and braced so that it will safely support all vertical and lateral loads that may be applied. The observed condition is non-compliant and must be corrected before work proceeds.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
}
